summary.notes: 4h ATR=2.50x confirmed optimal on full 2019-2026 cycle. 1h ATR=4.20x (DD 56%). 1d FAIL. Bull-only calibration was misleading; full-cycle validation confirmed 2.5x as optimal. Updated parameters: ADX_RANGE=15 (from adx-opt-002), ATR unchanged at 2.5x.

WARN: 0/6 PASS. Best factor volume_divergence_roc_48 IC=-0.0405. 0/4 factors improved ADX baseline (confirm mode, z=1.0). Candlestick patterns near-zero at 4h. Bollinger %b captured by existing RSI. Next: model-001 (LightGBM).

LightGBM predicts ADX regime well (ROC-AUC 0.801) but 63% of power from adx+adx_slope. Trading value near-zero: R²=0.0007 vs returns. Not recommended for integration. Next: explore external features (funding rate, OI, on-chain).
